response.justification: Despite extensive full-stack and open-source experience, the candidate lacks demonstrable C++ expertise in industrial automation contexts, with only a brief, non-detailed mention of C++ at National Instruments and no evidence of STL, multi-threading, message brokers, IEC 62443, or IoT protocol experience critical to the role.
strengths: Strong full-stack and open-source contributions with diverse tech exposure
Proven experience in distributed systems and event-driven architectures
Active knowledge sharing and technical mentoring through workshops and tools
concerns: No clear evidence of modern C++/STL development in the last 8+ years
Absence of industrial cybersecurity standards (IEC 62443) or protocol experience (MQTT, OPC UA, etc.)
Primary recent work is in TypeScript/Node.js/DLang, not C++ or embedded systems
